items.text: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system collision time constant to 8.0
items.fragment: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system collision time constant to 8.0
items.requirement_fragment: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system collision time constant to 8.0

items.text: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system recovery time constant to 5.0
items.fragment: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system recovery time constant to 5.0
items.requirement_fragment: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system recovery time constant to 5.0

items.text: When distance <= 10.0 feet, the ACAS_Monitor component shall assign acasRequested = true
items.fragment: When distance <= 10.0 feet, the ACAS_Monitor component shall assign acasRequested = true
items.requirement_fragment: When distance <= 10.0 feet, the ACAS_Monitor component shall assign acasRequested = true

items.text: During simulation, outImpact shall transition from 0.0 to 8.0
items.fragment: During simulation, outImpact shall transition from 0.0 to 8.0
items.requirement_fragment: During simulation, outImpact shall transition from 0.0 to 8.0

items.text: During simulation, outRecovery shall transition from 0.0 to 5.0
items.fragment: During simulation, outRecovery shall transition from 0.0 to 5.0
items.requirement_fragment: During simulation, outRecovery shall transition from 0.0 to 5.0
